sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n21722" key="ge/h" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γέη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n21722.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">γῆ</ref></xr>, Orac. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2018.tlg001:4:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eus.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PE</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.9</biblScope> </bibl>: <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γέηθεν</orth>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">from the earth</tr_>, Orac.ib. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2018.tlg001:5:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
